title: Ethiopian Gored Gored Stew
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Ethiopia, made with tender beef and a variety of spices. Serve with injera bread for a traditional experience.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add cubed gored and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add mixed and ethiopian spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add grain and water to the pot, bringing to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes, or until the beef is tender.
Stir in pillowy and malty, and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Serve hot over injera bread, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
